title: Table
description: Powerful table with sorting, pagination, selection, sticky header, expandable rows and tree support. Columns are defined with key + accessor.

props.columns: Column definitions (key, header, accessor, sortable, align…).
props.rowKey: Unique row identifier used by v-for and selection.
props.size: Font size and base row height.
props.striped: Applies an alternating background to even rows.
props.hover: Highlights the row under the cursor.
props.stickyHeader: Keeps the header visible while scrolling vertically.
props.radius: Rounds the outer corners of the table container.
props.overflow: Controls how cells handle content that exceeds their width.
props.loading: Shows a loading state while data is being fetched.
props.loadingRows: Number of skeleton rows shown when loading is true.
props.loadingMode: Render strategy for the loading state: skeleton rows or an overlay spinner.
props.emptyText: Message displayed when data is empty.
props.noResultsText: Message displayed when filters yield no results.
props.ariaLabel: Accessible label for the table element.
props.sort: Controlled sort state: array of \{ key, direction \} objects.
props.multiSort: Allows sorting by multiple columns simultaneously.
props.sortClearable: Whether clicking a sorted column a third time clears its sort.
props.selectable: Enables row selection. 'single' allows one row; 'multi' allows many.
props.selected: Controlled array of selected row keys.
props.isRowSelectable: Predicate to disable selection on specific rows.
props.filter: Controlled per-column filter values as a key → value map.
props.filterRow: Shows an inline filter input row below the header.
props.expandable: Adds an expand toggle to each row to reveal additional content.
props.expanded: Controlled array of expanded row keys.
props.isRowExpandable: Predicate to hide the expand toggle on specific rows.
props.pagination: Controlled pagination state: \{ page, pageSize, total \}.
props.pageSizeOptions: Options available in the page-size selector.
props.serverSide: Disables client-side sorting/filtering; delegates to the server via emits.
props.resizable: Allows column widths to be dragged to resize.
props.reorderable: Allows columns to be dragged to reorder.
props.state: Full serializable snapshot of sort, filter, pagination and column state.
props.minColumnWidth: Minimum column width in pixels when resizing.
props.virtual: Enables virtual scrolling for large datasets.
props.rowHeight: Fixed row height in pixels required for virtual scrolling.
props.overscan: Number of rows rendered outside the visible area for virtual scrolling.
props.virtualHeight: Container height used when virtual is true.
props.tree: Enables tree mode: child rows are read from the childrenKey property.
props.childrenKey: Property name that holds child rows in tree mode.
props.treeExpanded: Controlled array of expanded tree node keys.
props.loadChildren: Async function that loads children on demand for a given row.
props.hasChildrenHint: Predicate that indicates a row may have children before they are loaded.
props.groupBy: Groups rows by the given key or accessor function.
props.groupExpanded: Controlled array of expanded group keys.
props.stickyFirstColumn: Pins the first column while scrolling horizontally.
props.toolbar: Shows the built-in toolbar with search and column controls.
props.globalSearch: Enables a global search input in the toolbar.
props.globalSearchScope: Whether global search runs on all columns or only filterable ones.
props.globalSearchTerm: Controlled value of the global search input.
props.columnVisibility: Adds a column visibility toggle to the toolbar.
props.exportable: Adds export buttons (CSV, JSON, clipboard) to the toolbar.
props.exportFileName: Base file name used when exporting CSV or JSON.

emits.updateSort: Emitted when column sort order changes. Payload: TableSortState.
emits.updateSelected: Emitted when row selection changes. Payload: (string | number)[].
emits.updateFilter: Emitted when a column filter changes. Payload: TableFilterState.
emits.updateExpanded: Emitted when expandable rows are toggled. Payload: (string | number)[].
emits.updatePagination: Emitted when the page or page size changes. Payload: TablePaginationState.
emits.updateColumnsState: Emitted when columns are resized or reordered. Payload: TableColumnState[].
emits.updateTreeExpanded: Emitted when tree nodes are expanded or collapsed. Payload: (string | number)[].
emits.updateGroupExpanded: Emitted when groups are expanded or collapsed. Payload: (string | number)[].
emits.updateGlobalSearchTerm: Emitted when the global search input changes. Payload: string.
emits.rowActivate: Emitted when a row is activated via Enter or double-click.
emits.rowClick: Emitted when a row is clicked.
emits.cellEdit: Emitted when an editable cell value is committed. Payload: TableCellEditEvent.
emits.cellEditCancel: Emitted when an editable cell edit is cancelled.
emits.updateState: Emitted with a full snapshot of all table state.

slots.default: Fallback slot — currently unused, reserved for future extensions.
slots.caption: Accessible table caption rendered as a caption element.
slots.empty: Custom content shown when data is empty. Exposes { message }.
slots.noResults: Custom content shown when filters yield no results. Exposes \{ message, clear \}.
slots.footer: Content appended below the table body.
slots.toolbar: Custom toolbar content. Exposes \{ searchTerm, setSearchTerm, clearSearch \}.
slots.bulkActions: Shown in the toolbar when rows are selected. Exposes \{ selected, rows, count, clear \}.
slots.rowExpanded: Content inside an expanded row. Exposes \{ row, index \}.
slots.groupHeader: Custom group header. Exposes \{ value, rows, count, expanded, toggle, aggregations \}.
slots.cellKey: Custom cell renderer for the column with the given key. Exposes \{ row, value, index \}.
slots.headerKey: Custom header renderer for the column with the given key. Exposes \{ column \}.
slots.filterKey: Custom filter input for the column with the given key. Exposes \{ column, value, setValue, clear \}.

basic.title: Basic
basic.desc: Default configuration with four columns and standard typography.

striped.title: Striped + bordered
striped.desc: Alternating rows and full borders for easier reading in dense tables.

sort.title: With sorting
sort.desc: Mark any column as sortable to enable ascending / descending order.

compact.title: Compact density
compact.desc: Reduces vertical padding to show more rows in less space.

stickyHeader.title: Sticky header
stickyHeader.desc: The header stays fixed while scrolling inside the container.

selection.title: Row selection
selection.desc: Enable single or multi-row selection with checkboxes. Bind :selected and listen to \@update:selected.

pagination.title: Pagination
pagination.desc: Pass a pagination object with page, pageSize and total to split the data across pages.

loading.title: Loading state
loading.desc: Set :loading="true" to show skeleton rows while data is being fetched. Use loading-rows to control how many appear.

customCell.title: Custom cell slot
customCell.desc: Use the #cell-{key} slot to render any content inside a column. The slot exposes \{ row, value, index \}.

types.title: TypeScript interfaces
types.desc: Core types exported by Table: TableColumn, TableSortState, TableFilterState, TablePaginationState, TableCellEditEvent and TableColumnState.

a11y.kbTab: Move focus to the next focusable element (sortable header, checkbox or pagination control)
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous focusable element
a11y.kbEnter: Activate a sortable header (cycle asc → desc → none) or confirm an editable cell
a11y.kbSpace: Toggle selection on a focused row checkbox
a11y.ariaSort: Set to 'ascending' or 'descending' on active sort headers; 'none' on sortable but unsorted columns
a11y.ariaLabel: Provides an accessible name for the table element
a11y.ariaSelected: Set to 'true' on selected rows when selectable is enabled
a11y.focusNative: Focus is managed natively; use Tab to navigate between headers, checkboxes and pagination controls
a11y.focusTrap: Editable cells trap focus until the edit is committed or cancelled
